RepurpOS

Stroke (Ischaemic / Cerebrovascular Disease)

Disease intelligence for Ischemic Stroke: 112 alterations and 577 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

US DALYs3.79MWHO GHE 2021 · all ages
Global DALYs159.84MWHO GHE 2021 · worldwide
US mortality172.1K deaths/yrWHO GHE 2021
Global mortality6.96M deaths/yrWHO GHE 2021 · worldwide
NIH funding$422MFY2025 · RCDC estimate
Funding levelUnderfunded

Sources: Open Targets, HPO, ClinicalTrials.gov, DGIdb, ChEMBL, PubMed MeSH, PubMed Literature, PubMed NP · Pipeline phase 7 · Updated 2026-07-05

Remission & chronicity

Spontaneous remission
Spontaneous early neurological improvement in 10-20% within 24 hours of ischaemic stroke without intervention; functional independence at 3 months in only 40-50% without revascularisation; 15% 30-day mortality untreated
Best-intervention remission
IV thrombolysis (tPA/tenecteplase) within 4.5 hours: increases odds of favourable outcome by 30%; thrombectomy for large vessel occlusion within 24 hours: 46% functional independence vs 27% control (DAWN/DEFUSE); combined thrombolysis + thrombectomy: best outcomes in eligible patients
Drug-free remission
—
Relapse after remission
—
Chronicity
—
Gap size
Very large — enormous treatment gap; only 2-15% of eligible patients receive thrombolysis; <5% receive thrombectomy worldwide
Primary barrier
access/practice
Barrier detail: The 4.5-hour and 24-hour time windows are frequently missed due to delayed recognition, delayed presentation, or lack of stroke centre access; in-hospital treatment delays add further losses; secondary prevention (antihypertensives, statins, anticoagulation for AF) chronically underprescribed post-stroke

Last SoC change: 2023 — tenecteplase replacing tPA as preferred thrombolytic; 2024 extended thrombectomy window up to 24 hours (DAWN, DEFUSE 3); 2019 ARISE II positive for mobile stroke units; tPA established 1996 (unchanged 27 years as the backbone); thrombectomy evidence since 2015

Remission data layers: disease_db_100 · source-locked manual data · confidence: high

Related: Intervention atlas

Identifiers: MONDO: MONDO:1060198 · MESH: D020521 · UMLS_CUI: C0948008

Therapeutics

Direct disease associations, biomarker-linked drugs, OSMF narrative-review natural agents, merged ranking, and clinical trial / literature evidence (top agents)

DrugTypePhaseEvidence ScoreTrials & literatureSourcesLinks
ALTEPLASE Small molecule Approved Strong 105
8 trials 75 Cochrane 134 Meta-analysis 329 Trial pubs 278 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT05626972 — Tenecteplase Compared to Alteplase for Patients With Large Vesel Oclusion Suspicion Before Thrombectomy (UNKNOWN) PHASE3
  • NCT03997292 — Intravenous Thrombolysis Registry for Acute Ischemic Stroke in China (WITHDRAWN)
  • NCT05395338 — 1-year Clinical Outcomes in Recombinant Tissue Plasminogen Activator (Rt-PA) Treated Chinese Acute Ischaemic Stroke (AIS) Patients (COMPLETED)
  • NCT05644938 — Optimizing Door-to-reperfusion Times of One-stop Management in Acute Ischemic Stroke (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT05395351 — Alteplase in Elderly Acute Ischemic Stroke (AIS) Patients During Hospitalization (COMPLETED)
  • NCT06018181 — Outcomes After Intravenous Alteplase / Tenecteplase With or Without Shuxuetong Injection in Routine Clinical Practice (COMPLETED)
  • NCT03392792 — Regisry of the Stroke Patients in Assiut University Hospital (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT01220739 — Safety of Rt-PA + Transcranial Emission of Low-Energy Lasers for Acute Stroke Recovery (TERMINATED) PHASE2

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Comparative efficacy and safety between intravenous recombinant human prourokinase and alteplase in acute ischemic stroke treatment: a meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Minerva medica, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Relationship between blood pressure level with prognosis of acute ischemic stroke patients treated with intravenous thrombolysis: a systematic review and meta-analysis (BMC neurology, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Safety and Efficacy of Thrombolysis Prior to Thrombectomy in Large-Vessel Acute Ischemic Stroke: An Updated Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (The American journal of cardiology, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Intravenous thrombolysis versus standard medical therapy in minor stroke patients with large vessel severe stenosis or occlusion: a systematic review and meta-analysis (BMC medicine, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Tenecteplase versus alteplase for acute ischemic stroke (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Cost-Effectiveness of Thrombectomy With or Without Alteplase in Large Vessel Occlusion Stroke: A Meta-Analysis Considering Time-to-Treatment (Neurology, 2026)
  • Systematic review Efficacy, safety and dosing of intravenous alteplase administered beyond 4.5 hours for ischemic stroke: systematic review and meta-analysis (The International journal of neuroscience, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Predictors and Consequences of Serious Adverse Events in Patients Treated With Thrombolysis: A Prespecified Secondary Analysis of the AcT Trial (Journal of the American Heart Association, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Association of 24-Hour Computed Tomography Infarct Density on Functional Outcomes in Stroke: Secondary Analysis From the AcT Trial (Journal of the American Heart Association, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of time on reperfusion in acute ischemic stroke treated with thrombolysis within the 4.5-hour window: a secondary analysis of the AcT Trial (Journal of stroke and cerebrovascular diseases : the official journal of National Stroke Association, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Adjunctive Intra-Arterial Alteplase After Successful Thrombectomy for Acute Ischemic Stroke: The CHOICE-2 Randomized Clinical Trial (JAMA, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy and Safety of Reteplase Versus Alteplase in Acute Ischemic Stroke Based on Fibrinogen Levels: The RAISE Trial Subgroup (Journal of the American Heart Association, 2026)

ASPIRIN Small molecule Approved Strong 105
8 trials 185 Cochrane 293 Meta-analysis 776 Trial pubs 668 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT06316570 — Ticagrelor With Aspirin Dual Antiplatelet Therapy Combined With Intravenous Thrombolysis for Ischemic Stroke (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00691314 — Efficacy and Safety of Stent Implantation in Symptomatic Extra- and Intracranial Artery Stenosis (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00966316 — Establishment and Evaluation to the Effects of a Clinical Pathway for Acute Ischemic Stroke (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT06899399 — Efficacy and Safety Study of Endovascular Treatment of Asymptomatic Carotid Artery Stenosis (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT05507645 — ProUrokinase for Mild Ischemic Cerebrovascular Events (PUMICE) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT06683300 — Drug Eluting Stenting and Short Dual Antiplatelet Therapy for Preventing Recurrent Stroke in Vertebral Stenosis Registry Study (NOT_YET_RECRUITING)
  • NCT06591377 — Combining Aspirin With Ticagrelor or Cilostazol in Large-vessel Minor Stroke or TIA (RECRUITING) PHASE3
  • NCT03186456 — The Safety and Efficacy of Human Umbilical Cord Mesenchymal Stem Cells (19#iSCLife®-ACI) in the Treatment of Acute Cerebral Infarction (SUSPENDED) PHASE1

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Optimal duration of dual antiplatelet therapy for secondary stroke prevention: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Journal of clinical neuroscience : official journal of the Neurosurgical Society of Australasia, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Aspirin and other nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs) for preventing colorectal cancer and colorectal adenoma in the general population (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Efficacy, Safety, and Net Clinical Benefit of Post-Atrial Fibrillation Ablation Anticoagulation (Pacing and clinical electrophysiology : PACE, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Aspirin plus clopidogrel versus aspirin alone in patients with mild-to-moderate stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Medicine, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Impact of dual antiplatelet therapy within 72 hours post mild ischemic stroke and transient ischemic attack: meta-analysis (Brain injury, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Safety and efficacy of ticagrelor plus aspirin vs. aspirin monotherapy in patients undergoing coronary artery bypass grafting: A meta-analysis with trial sequential analysis (Journal of thrombosis and thrombolysis, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Antiplatelet dilemma: Clopidogrel or aspirin for long-term cardiovascular protection after dual antiplatelet therapy following PCI (Medicine, 2026)
  • Systematic review Switching From Aspirin Monotherapy After Noncardioembolic Stroke: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Stroke, 2026)
  • Systematic review Effectiveness and safety of different antiplatelet therapies for minor ischemic stroke or high-risk transient ischemic attack: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (International journal of clinical pharmacy, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Dual Antiplatelet Therapy and Immediate Intensive Statin in Mild Ischemic Stroke: A Randomized Trial (Neurology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication The effect of dose of aspirin in high-risk TIA and minor ischemic stroke patients receiving dual antiplatelet medication (Journal of stroke and cerebrovascular diseases : the official journal of National Stroke Association, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Ticagrelor with aspirin dual antiplatelet therapy combined with intravenous thrombolysis in patients with ischaemic stroke in China (TAPIS): a multicentre, double-blind, randomised controlled trial (Lancet (London, England), 2026)

DIPYRIDAMOLE Small molecule Approved Strong 105
8 trials 23 Cochrane 32 Meta-analysis 60 Trial pubs 48 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT06899399 — Efficacy and Safety Study of Endovascular Treatment of Asymptomatic Carotid Artery Stenosis (RECRUITING) NA

  • NCT06983795 — Pioneering Advancements in Cardiocerebrovascular Interactions in the Asia pacFIC - Patent Foramen Ovale Study (NOT_YET_RECRUITING)
  • NCT00562289 — Patent Foramen Ovale Closure or Anticoagulants Versus Antiplatelet Therapy to Prevent Stroke Recurrence (COMPLETED) PHASE3

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Impact of dual antiplatelet therapy within 72 hours post mild ischemic stroke and transient ischemic attack: meta-analysis (Brain injury, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Antiplatelet versus anticoagulation treatment for people with heart failure in sinus rhythm (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Acute treatment and secondary prevention for patients with minor stroke or transient ischemic attack: A Bayesian network meta-analysis (European stroke journal, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Efficacy and safety of edaravone combined with Ginkgo Leaf Extract and Dipyridamole in the treatment of acute cerebral infarction: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Medicine, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Antiplatelet therapy for secondary prevention of lacunar stroke: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (European journal of clinical pharmacology, 2023)
  • Systematic review Contemporary antiplatelet therapy for secondary stroke prevention: a narrative review of current literature and guidelines (Stroke and vascular neurology, 2022)
  • Systematic review Antiplatelet drugs for secondary prevention in patients with ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (BMC neurology, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Bleeding with intensive versus guideline antiplatelet therapy in acute cerebral ischaemia (Scientific reports, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of Dose Titration on Dipyridamole-Induced Headache: A Randomized, Double-Blind Clinical Trial (Cerebrovascular diseases (Basel, Switzerland), 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Comparison of Antiplatelet Therapies for Prevention of Patent Foramen Ovale-Associated Stroke (Journal of stroke and cerebrovascular diseases : the official journal of National Stroke Association, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Triple versus guideline antiplatelet therapy to prevent recurrence after acute ischaemic stroke or transient ischaemic attack: the TARDIS RCT (Health technology assessment (Winchester, England), 2018)
  • Clinical trial publication Antiplatelet therapy with aspirin, clopidogrel, and dipyridamole versus clopidogrel alone or aspirin and dipyridamole in patients with acute cerebral ischaemia (TARDIS): a randomised, open-label, phase 3 superiority trial (Lancet (London, England), 2018)

SIMVASTATIN Small molecule Approved Strong 105
8 trials 7 Cochrane 14 Meta-analysis 33 Trial pubs 27 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00691314 — Efficacy and Safety of Stent Implantation in Symptomatic Extra- and Intracranial Artery Stenosis (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT00080275 — Evaluation of the Safety & Efficacy of a Combination of Niacin ER & Simvastatin in Patients With Dyslipidemia (OCEANS) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT01073007 — Stroke Treatment With Acute Reperfusion and Simvastatin (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00120289 — Niacin Plus Statin to Prevent Vascular Events (TERMINATED) PHASE3
  • NCT06785740 — Statins in Frail Older Patients with Ischemic Stroke or Transient Ischemic Attack - the Prospective Cohort Study (RECRUITING)
  • NCT00079638 — Comparative Efficacy Evaluation of Lipids When Treated With Niaspan & Statin or Other Lipid-Modifying Therapies-COMPELL (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00461630 — Treatment of HDL to Reduce the Incidence of Vascular Events HPS2-THRIVE (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT00124072 — Study of the Effectiveness of Additional Reductions in Cholesterol and Homocysteine (COMPLETED) PHASE3

Published literature

  • Cochrane review High-dose statins for the prevention of recurrent ischemic stroke: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Annals of Saudi medicine, 2025)
  • Cochrane review HMG CoA reductase inhibitors (statins) for people with chronic kidney disease not requiring dialysis (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2023)
  • Cochrane review Secondary prevention of major cerebrovascular events with seven different statins: a multi-treatment meta-analysis (Drug design, development and therapy, 2017)
  • Cochrane review Lipid Screening in Childhood and Adolescence for Detection of Familial Hypercholesterolemia: Evidence Report and Systematic Review for the US Preventive Services Task Force (JAMA, 2016)
  • Cochrane review Statins for acute coronary syndrome (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2014)
  • Meta-analysis Statin treatment and accrual of covert cerebral ischaemia on neuroimaging: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized trials (European journal of neurology, 2020)
  • Meta-analysis Statin Therapy in Ischemic Stroke Models: A Meta-Analysis (Translational stroke research, 2020)
  • Meta-analysis Comparison of statins for secondary prevention in patients with ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (BMC medicine, 2019)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of a Cardiovascular Polypill on Poststroke Cognition Among Ghanaians: Secondary Analysis of a Randomized Clinical Trial (Journal of the American Heart Association, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication A cardiovascular polypill for secondary stroke prevention in a tertiary centre in Ghana (SMAART): a phase 2 randomised clinical trial (The Lancet. Global health, 2023)
  • Clinical trial publication Prevention of Stroke with the Addition of Ezetimibe to Statin Therapy in Patients With Acute Coronary Syndrome in IMPROVE-IT (Improved Reduction of Outcomes: Vytorin Efficacy International Trial) (Circulation, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication Long-term Safety and Efficacy of Achieving Very Low Levels of Low-Density Lipoprotein Cholesterol : A Prespecified Analysis of the IMPROVE-IT Trial (JAMA cardiology, 2017)

TICAGRELOR Small molecule Approved Strong 105

  • NCT06316570 — Ticagrelor With Aspirin Dual Antiplatelet Therapy Combined With Intravenous Thrombolysis for Ischemic Stroke (COMPLETED) PHASE3

  • NCT04962451 — Comparison of the Efficacy of Ticagrelor Combined With ASA to ASA Alone in Patients With Stroke (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01947959 — Study of Rivaroxaban Use and Potential Adverse Outcomes in Routine Clinical Practice (Germany) (COMPLETED)
  • NCT06196047 — Ticagrelor Versus Cilostazol in Minor Ischemic Stroke or TIA (RECRUITING) PHASE3
  • NCT06853535 — Precision Antiplatelet Therapy Guided by Platelet Aggregation Function in Patients With Acute Ischemic STROKE (RECRUITING) PHASE3

  • Cochrane review Optimal duration of dual antiplatelet therapy for secondary stroke prevention: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Journal of clinical neuroscience : official journal of the Neurosurgical Society of Australasia, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Impact of dual antiplatelet therapy within 72 hours post mild ischemic stroke and transient ischemic attack: meta-analysis (Brain injury, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Effectiveness and safety of different antiplatelet therapies for minor ischemic stroke or high-risk transient ischemic attack: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (International journal of clinical pharmacy, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Comparative efficacy and safety of different durations of dual antiplatelet therapy in acute minor non-cardioembolic stroke: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (Journal of neurology, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Antiplatelet versus anticoagulation treatment for people with heart failure in sinus rhythm (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Safety and efficacy of ticagrelor plus aspirin vs. aspirin monotherapy in patients undergoing coronary artery bypass grafting: A meta-analysis with trial sequential analysis (Journal of thrombosis and thrombolysis, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Genotype-guided ticagrelor/prasugrel versus clopidogrel therapy in stroke patients with CYP2C19 loss of function alleles: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Pharmacogenomics, 2025)
  • Systematic review Interaction of CYP2C19 with the effect of clopidogrel in secondary prevention of major ischemic events: Systematic review and meta-analysis (International journal of stroke : official journal of the International Stroke Society, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Ticagrelor with aspirin dual antiplatelet therapy combined with intravenous thrombolysis in patients with ischaemic stroke in China (TAPIS): a multicentre, double-blind, randomised controlled trial (Lancet (London, England), 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of insulin resistance on ticagrelor-versus clopidogrel-based dual antiplatelet therapy for secondary prevention of stroke in carriers of CYP2C19 loss-of-function mutations (CMAJ : Canadian Medical Association journal = journal de l'Association medicale canadienne, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Lp-PLA2 Activity and Genotype-Guided Dual Antiplatelet Therapy in Minor Stroke or Transient Ischemic Attack (Stroke, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Differential Effect of Ticagrelor Versus Clopidogrel by Causative Classification of Stroke Classification and Vascular Cellular Adhesion Molecule-1 Level on the Risk of Recurrent Stroke: A Post Hoc Analysis of the CHANCE-2 Trial (Journal of the American Heart Association, 2026)

7 Trial pubs 7 RCT
View evidence

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication Prognostic utility of secretory phospholipase A(2) in patients with stable coronary artery disease (Clinical chemistry, 2011)
  • Clinical trial publication Pulse pressure and risk of cardiovascular outcomes in patients with hypertension and coronary artery disease: an INternational VErapamil SR-trandolapril STudy (INVEST) analysis (European heart journal, 2009)
  • Clinical trial publication Alpha-adducin polymorphism associated with increased risk of adverse cardiovascular outcomes: results from GENEtic Substudy of the INternational VErapamil SR-trandolapril STudy (INVEST-GENES) (American heart journal, 2008)
  • Clinical trial publication Verapamil-sustained release-based treatment strategy is equivalent to atenolol-based treatment strategy at reducing cardiovascular events in patients with prior myocardial infarction: an INternational VErapamil SR-Trandolapril (INVEST) substudy (American heart journal, 2008)
  • Clinical trial publication Prognostic significance of the Centers for Disease Control/American Heart Association high-sensitivity C-reactive protein cut points for cardiovascular and other outcomes in patients with stable coronary artery disease (Circulation, 2007)

ALTEPLASE Small molecule Approved Strong 105
8 trials 75 Cochrane 134 Meta-analysis 329 Trial pubs 278 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT05626972 — Tenecteplase Compared to Alteplase for Patients With Large Vesel Oclusion Suspicion Before Thrombectomy (UNKNOWN) PHASE3
  • NCT03997292 — Intravenous Thrombolysis Registry for Acute Ischemic Stroke in China (WITHDRAWN)
  • NCT05395338 — 1-year Clinical Outcomes in Recombinant Tissue Plasminogen Activator (Rt-PA) Treated Chinese Acute Ischaemic Stroke (AIS) Patients (COMPLETED)
  • NCT05644938 — Optimizing Door-to-reperfusion Times of One-stop Management in Acute Ischemic Stroke (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT05395351 — Alteplase in Elderly Acute Ischemic Stroke (AIS) Patients During Hospitalization (COMPLETED)
  • NCT06018181 — Outcomes After Intravenous Alteplase / Tenecteplase With or Without Shuxuetong Injection in Routine Clinical Practice (COMPLETED)
  • NCT03392792 — Regisry of the Stroke Patients in Assiut University Hospital (UNKNOWN) NA
  • NCT01220739 — Safety of Rt-PA + Transcranial Emission of Low-Energy Lasers for Acute Stroke Recovery (TERMINATED) PHASE2

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Comparative efficacy and safety between intravenous recombinant human prourokinase and alteplase in acute ischemic stroke treatment: a meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Minerva medica, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Relationship between blood pressure level with prognosis of acute ischemic stroke patients treated with intravenous thrombolysis: a systematic review and meta-analysis (BMC neurology, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Safety and Efficacy of Thrombolysis Prior to Thrombectomy in Large-Vessel Acute Ischemic Stroke: An Updated Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (The American journal of cardiology, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Intravenous thrombolysis versus standard medical therapy in minor stroke patients with large vessel severe stenosis or occlusion: a systematic review and meta-analysis (BMC medicine, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Tenecteplase versus alteplase for acute ischemic stroke (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Cost-Effectiveness of Thrombectomy With or Without Alteplase in Large Vessel Occlusion Stroke: A Meta-Analysis Considering Time-to-Treatment (Neurology, 2026)
  • Systematic review Efficacy, safety and dosing of intravenous alteplase administered beyond 4.5 hours for ischemic stroke: systematic review and meta-analysis (The International journal of neuroscience, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Predictors and Consequences of Serious Adverse Events in Patients Treated With Thrombolysis: A Prespecified Secondary Analysis of the AcT Trial (Journal of the American Heart Association, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Association of 24-Hour Computed Tomography Infarct Density on Functional Outcomes in Stroke: Secondary Analysis From the AcT Trial (Journal of the American Heart Association, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of time on reperfusion in acute ischemic stroke treated with thrombolysis within the 4.5-hour window: a secondary analysis of the AcT Trial (Journal of stroke and cerebrovascular diseases : the official journal of National Stroke Association, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Adjunctive Intra-Arterial Alteplase After Successful Thrombectomy for Acute Ischemic Stroke: The CHOICE-2 Randomized Clinical Trial (JAMA, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy and Safety of Reteplase Versus Alteplase in Acute Ischemic Stroke Based on Fibrinogen Levels: The RAISE Trial Subgroup (Journal of the American Heart Association, 2026)

ASPIRIN Small molecule Approved Strong 105
8 trials 185 Cochrane 293 Meta-analysis 776 Trial pubs 668 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT06316570 — Ticagrelor With Aspirin Dual Antiplatelet Therapy Combined With Intravenous Thrombolysis for Ischemic Stroke (COMPLETED) PHASE3

  • NCT00966316 — Establishment and Evaluation to the Effects of a Clinical Pathway for Acute Ischemic Stroke (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT06899399 — Efficacy and Safety Study of Endovascular Treatment of Asymptomatic Carotid Artery Stenosis (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT05507645 — ProUrokinase for Mild Ischemic Cerebrovascular Events (PUMICE) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT06683300 — Drug Eluting Stenting and Short Dual Antiplatelet Therapy for Preventing Recurrent Stroke in Vertebral Stenosis Registry Study (NOT_YET_RECRUITING)
  • NCT06591377 — Combining Aspirin With Ticagrelor or Cilostazol in Large-vessel Minor Stroke or TIA (RECRUITING) PHASE3
  • NCT03186456 — The Safety and Efficacy of Human Umbilical Cord Mesenchymal Stem Cells (19#iSCLife®-ACI) in the Treatment of Acute Cerebral Infarction (SUSPENDED) PHASE1

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Optimal duration of dual antiplatelet therapy for secondary stroke prevention: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Journal of clinical neuroscience : official journal of the Neurosurgical Society of Australasia, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Aspirin and other nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs) for preventing colorectal cancer and colorectal adenoma in the general population (The Cochrane database of systematic reviews, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Efficacy, Safety, and Net Clinical Benefit of Post-Atrial Fibrillation Ablation Anticoagulation (Pacing and clinical electrophysiology : PACE, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Aspirin plus clopidogrel versus aspirin alone in patients with mild-to-moderate stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Medicine, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Impact of dual antiplatelet therapy within 72 hours post mild ischemic stroke and transient ischemic attack: meta-analysis (Brain injury, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Safety and efficacy of ticagrelor plus aspirin vs. aspirin monotherapy in patients undergoing coronary artery bypass grafting: A meta-analysis with trial sequential analysis (Journal of thrombosis and thrombolysis, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Antiplatelet dilemma: Clopidogrel or aspirin for long-term cardiovascular protection after dual antiplatelet therapy following PCI (Medicine, 2026)
  • Systematic review Switching From Aspirin Monotherapy After Noncardioembolic Stroke: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Stroke, 2026)
  • Systematic review Effectiveness and safety of different antiplatelet therapies for minor ischemic stroke or high-risk transient ischemic attack: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (International journal of clinical pharmacy, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Dual Antiplatelet Therapy and Immediate Intensive Statin in Mild Ischemic Stroke: A Randomized Trial (Neurology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication The effect of dose of aspirin in high-risk TIA and minor ischemic stroke patients receiving dual antiplatelet medication (Journal of stroke and cerebrovascular diseases : the official journal of National Stroke Association, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Ticagrelor with aspirin dual antiplatelet therapy combined with intravenous thrombolysis in patients with ischaemic stroke in China (TAPIS): a multicentre, double-blind, randomised controlled trial (Lancet (London, England), 2026)

  • Meta-analysis Switching From Aspirin Monotherapy After Noncardioembolic Stroke: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Stroke, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Hypertension With High-Risk Features in Cryptogenic Stroke: An Exploratory Analysis of the ARCADIA Randomized Clinical Trial (JAMA neurology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Early versus delayed DOAC after ischaemic stroke in atrial fibrillation: 1-year outcomes in the TIMING study and in concurrent practice (European stroke journal, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Apixaban Versus Aspirin and Risk of Hemorrhage in the ARCADIA Trial (Annals of neurology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Multiterritory Brain Infarcts, Anticoagulation, and Recurrence After Cryptogenic Stroke: A Subgroup Analysis of the ARCADIA Trial (Stroke, 2026)

RIVAROXABAN Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 97 Cochrane 164 Meta-analysis 171 Trial pubs 142 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT04099238 — Burden of Ischemic Stroke and Intake of Oral Anticoagulants in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation in the UK Primary Care (COMPLETED)
  • NCT03772457 — Predictive Value of Infarction Volume on Hemorrhagic Transformation in Ischemic Stroke/TIA With Non-valve Atrial Fibrillation(NVAF) Patients Using Rivaroxaban (UNKNOWN)
  • NCT01947959 — Study of Rivaroxaban Use and Potential Adverse Outcomes in Routine Clinical Practice (Germany) (COMPLETED)
  • NCT05825573 — Anticoagulation Therapy in Non-device-related Intra-cardiac Thrombus (ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING) PHASE3
  • NCT04416048 — Effect of Anticoagulation Therapy on Clinical Outcomes in COVID-19 (TERMINATED) PHASE2
  • NCT06212674 — Single-stage Pulmonary Vein Isolation Combined With Percutaneous Left Atrial Appendage Occluder Implantation in Patients With Recent Onset Ischemic Stroke and Atrial Fibrillation (RECRUITING) PHASE4
  • NCT02309970 — Perfusion Computer Tomography: Imaging and Clinical Validation Following Reperfusion Therapy in Acute Ischaemic Stroke (UNKNOWN)
  • NCT02635230 — What is the Optimal antiplatElet and Anticoagulant Therapy in Patients With Oral Anticoagulation Undergoing revasculariSaTion 2. (UNKNOWN)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Comparative efficacy and safety of apixaban and rivaroxaban versus warfarin in atrial fibrillation patients with end-stage renal disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Renal failure, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Direct oral anticoagulants versus vitamin K antagonists for postoperative atrial fibrillation after cardiac surgery: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (BMC cardiovascular disorders, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Efficacy and Safety of Direct Oral Anticoagulants in Patients After Heart Valve Replacement or Repair: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Clinical therapeutics, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Direct oral anticoagulants versus vitamin K antagonists in concurrent hypertrophic cardiomyopathy and atrial fibrillation: a meta-analysis (Expert review of cardiovascular therapy, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Rapid assessment of direct oral anticoagulants in acute stroke-An educational systematic review (European stroke journal, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy and Safety of DOACs in Patients with Atrial Fibrillation and History of Falls or Risk of Falls: The Liverpool AF-Falls Project. A Systematic Review and Bayesian Network Meta-analysis (Drugs & aging, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis NOACs effects in the secondary prevention of atrial fibrillation-related ischemic stroke/TIA: a systematic review and meta-analysis (Journal of neurology, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Switching From Aspirin Monotherapy After Noncardioembolic Stroke: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Stroke, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Early versus delayed DOAC after ischaemic stroke in atrial fibrillation: 1-year outcomes in the TIMING study and in concurrent practice (European stroke journal, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Abelacimab vs Rivaroxaban in Older Individuals With Atrial Fibrillation: A Prespecified Analysis of the Phase 2b AZALEA-TIMI 71 Trial (JAMA cardiology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Anticoagulation to prevent ischemic stroke and neurocognitive impairment in atrial fibrillation: the BRAIN-AF randomized clinical trial (Nature medicine, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Antithrombotic Therapy after Successful Catheter Ablation for Atrial Fibrillation (The New England journal of medicine, 2026)

  • NCT03448159 — Fluoxetine Opens Window to Improve Motor Recovery After Stroke (COMPLETED) PHASE2

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Meta-analysis of the clinical effectiveness of combined acupuncture and Western Medicine to treat post-stroke depression (Journal of traditional Chinese medicine = Chung i tsa chih ying wen pan, 2021)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy and safety of modified Sini San for treating poststroke depression: A meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Explore (New York, N.Y.), 2021)

  • Clinical trial publication Clinical studies on event-related potentials (ERPs) N400 and the related factors in patients with poststroke depression (PSD) (International journal of psychiatry in medicine, 2010)

Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.
